caption: The video captures a formal meeting of the House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs, held on April 12, 2019, focusing on S.23, a bill to increase the minimum wage. The setting appears to be an official committee room with several individuals seated around a table, engaged in discussion or listening attentively. Some attendees are dressed in business attire, indicating the professional nature of the event. The camera pans across the room, showing various participants, including both men and women, who seem to be involved in the proceedings. The atmosphere suggests a serious and structured debate, with documents and water bottles visible on the table, further emphasizing the formal context of the meeting.
